Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 170 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels for All 27 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Lent and Lisp 24 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. The Social Smolnet 110 upvotes, 13 comments
  5. Ghostling 86 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. Work_mem: It's a Trap 32 upvotes, 2 comments
  7. Attention Residuals 123 upvotes, 19 comments
  8. Meme Buildings 20 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis 40 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 719 upvotes, 250 comments
  11. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 547 upvotes, 193 comments
  12. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 28 upvotes, 5 comments
  13. Show HN: Baltic shadow fleet tracker – live AIS, cable proximity alerts 30 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 151 upvotes, 54 comments
  15. An FAQ on Reinforcement Learning Environments 19 upvotes, 3 comments
  16. Parallel Perl – Autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 99 upvotes, 35 comments
  17. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 432 upvotes, 198 comments
  18. VisiCalc Reconstructed 163 upvotes, 69 comments
  19. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 173 upvotes, 74 comments
  20. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 293 upvotes, 162 comments
  21. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 67 upvotes, 30 comments
  22. We rewrote our Rust WASM Parser in TypeScript – and it got 3x Faster 102 upvotes, 56 comments
  23. Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser 46 upvotes, 27 comments
  24. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 470 upvotes, 393 comments
  25. Heisuke Hironaka Has Died 6 upvotes, 1 comments
  26. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 42 upvotes, 29 comments
  27. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas 112 upvotes, 104 comments
  28. Show HN: Red Grid Link – peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth, no servers 18 upvotes, 12 comments
  29. Our commitment to Windows quality 405 upvotes, 738 comments
  30. Discontinuation and reinitiation of dual-labeled GLP-1 receptor agonists 55 upvotes, 81 comments

Last generated 10:00am, 21 March 2026. Source here.
